---
title: "espnGameidMake"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(devtools)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(tibble)
library(tidyverse)
load_all()
espn_game_ids <- espnGameIds()

```

```{r}
#out_dir <- "data/espn_game_ids"
#dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

```

```{r}
espn_game_ids %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  group_walk(~ {
    file_name <- paste0(
      out_dir, "/espn_game_ids_", gsub("-", "_", .y$season), ".rds"
    )
    saveRDS(.x, file_name)
  })

```
